selection.selection_note: Judged only owned repair batch 31 against full standard_source_table metadata, semantic_brief, S-57/OpenCPN structure, S-101/OpenCPN provider witnesses, Chart No.1 parity crops where available, and actual batch-31 Helm candidate SVG/renders on branch.

verdicts.expected: HULKES01 is hulk: S-57 object HULKES with S-52 instruction SY(HULKES01), requiring the compact brown hulk silhouette from the S-101/OpenCPN witnesses.
verdicts.judge_comments: Semantic gate passes: correct hulk class, low horizontal hull/body shape, brown load-bearing colour, and no dangerous buoy/beacon/topmark confusion. Candidate is larger and cleaner than the tiny OpenCPN raster witness, but this is acceptable chart-glyph styling and not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is now a compact low brown hulk silhouette with a black outline and no upright leaf, mast, ribs, or generic boat-profile substitution.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual/semantic rerun; candidate may move only to judge_pass_pending_final_approval and must not be final-approved by this artifact.

verdicts.expected: LNDARE01 is land as a point at small scale: S-57 object LNDARE with S-52 instruction SY(LNDARE01), requiring a tiny land-area point/dot witness rather than a target or area placeholder.
verdicts.judge_comments: Semantic gate passes: correct LNDARE point class, compact dot shape, no target-ring substitution, and no dangerous navigational-marker confusion. The dot is rendered larger than the OpenCPN bitmap but remains a compact chart glyph; not final-approved.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is now a small plain gray point/dot marker with the prior outer ring and bullseye treatment removed.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual/semantic rerun; candidate may move only to judge_pass_pending_final_approval and must not be final-approved by this artifact.

verdicts.expected: LOCMAG01 is a cursor pick site for magnetic anomaly at a point: S-57 object LOCMAG with S-52 instruction SY(LOCMAG01), requiring the magenta wedge/vertical-line point glyph.
verdicts.judge_comments: Semantic gate passes: correct LOCMAG point class, magenta magnetic-anomaly colour family, open wedge/line convention, and no letterform substitution. Stroke weight and size are Helm style differences only; not final-approved.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a magenta open wedge attached to a vertical reference line, with the previous A-shaped triangle, crossbar, and baseline removed.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual/semantic rerun; candidate may move only to judge_pass_pending_final_approval and must not be final-approved by this artifact.

verdicts.expected: LOCMAG51 is a cursor pick site for magnetic anomaly along a line or over an area: S-57 object LOCMAG with S-52 instruction SY(LOCMAG51), requiring the line/area magenta wedge/vertical-line glyph.
verdicts.judge_comments: Semantic gate passes: correct LOCMAG line/area class, pale magenta area/line convention, open wedge/line shape, and no point-letter substitution. The candidate keeps the compact chart-symbol language; not final-approved.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is the pale magenta line/area variant of the magnetic-anomaly wedge/vertical-line glyph, with no A-body, crossbar, or baseline.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual/semantic rerun; candidate may move only to judge_pass_pending_final_approval and must not be final-approved by this artifact.

verdicts.expected: MAGVAR01 is a cursor pick site for magnetic variation at a point: S-57 object MAGVAR with S-52 instruction SY(MAGVAR01), requiring the filled magenta variation wedge/vertical-line point glyph.
verdicts.judge_comments: Semantic gate passes: correct MAGVAR point class, filled wedge convention, magenta colour family, and no generic flag or monogram substitution. Candidate scale is stylized but still a compact chart glyph; not final-approved.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is now a compact filled magenta wedge on a short vertical reference line, with the generic flag-on-pole and base treatment removed.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual/semantic rerun; candidate may move only to judge_pass_pending_final_approval and must not be final-approved by this artifact.

verdicts.expected: MAGVAR51 is a cursor pick site for magnetic variation along a line or over an area: S-57 object MAGVAR with S-52 instruction SY(MAGVAR51), requiring the line/area filled wedge/vertical-line variation glyph.
verdicts.judge_comments: Semantic gate passes: correct MAGVAR line/area class, pale magenta area/line convention, filled wedge/vertical-line shape, and no dangerous confusion with a generic point flag. Not final-approved.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is the pale line/area variant of the compact filled magenta wedge on a vertical reference line, with no flagpole base or invented monogram.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual/semantic rerun; candidate may move only to judge_pass_pending_final_approval and must not be final-approved by this artifact.
